name: New Proxy 3D Chamber
summary: Experience improved flavour, efficiency, and performance with the Puffco New Proxy 3D Chamber.
description: Experience improved flavour, efficiency, and performance with the Puffco New Proxy 3D Chamber. This upgraded replacement chamber features an advanced ceramic bowl and 3D side-wall heating technology for faster, more even vaporisation—preserving terpenes and maximising every session’s taste and potency. Designed as an official replacement for the Puffco New Proxy modular vaporiser, the New Proxy 3D Chamber delivers smoother, denser vapour while offering easier cleaning and longer-lasting reliability compared to the original model. Cleaning: The glazed ceramic surface wipes clean effortlessly, making maintenance simple and efficient. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
